title: SemanticIssueKind diagnostic catalog (60+ variants)
body:
Added **`diagnostic_kinds`** with **`SemanticIssueKind`**—60+ error and warning variants covering semantic analysis failures with stable codes for docs and IDE surfacing.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`c308ffb`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/c308ffb)
- **Subject:** Add diagnostic_kinds module with SemanticIssueKind enum and 60+ error/warning variants for semantic analysis
- **Completed:** 2026-02-28

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-analysis`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-analysis-foundation`

## Relation
Staged rules need stable diagnostic identities for spec tables, LSP publishing, and CI snapshot tests. Catalog grew with parser/semantic research commits (e.g. `33eaa35` doc updates listing integration status).

source.subject: Add diagnostic_kinds module with SemanticIssueKind enum and 60+ error/warning variants for semantic analysis
